# Get signed URL for upload part

GET https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/{uploadId}/parts/{partNumber}/url

Return a presigned URL to upload a specific part number for a media upload session.

    Scope required: `write:media`

Reference: https://api.fanvue.com/docs/api-reference/reference/media/get-upload-part-url

## OpenAPI Specification

```yaml
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: API
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /media/uploads/{uploadId}/parts/{partNumber}/url:
    get:
      operationId: get-upload-part-url
      summary: Get signed URL for upload part
      description: >-
        Return a presigned URL to upload a specific part number for a media
        upload session.

            Scope required: `write:media`
      tags:
        - ''
      parameters:
        - name: uploadId
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: partNumber
          in: path
          required: false
          schema:
            type: number
            format: double
        - name: Authorization
          in: header
          description: Bearer authentication
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: X-Fanvue-API-Version
          in: header
          description: API version to use for the request
          required: true
          schema:
            type: string
            default: '2025-06-26'
      responses:
        '200':
          description: Response with status 200
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: object
                properties: {}
        '401':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/GetUploadPartUrlRequestUnauthorizedError'
        '403':
          description: Unauthorized Response
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/GetUploadPartUrlRequestForbiddenError'
        '410':
          description: API version no longer supported (sunset)
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: '#/components/schemas/GetUploadPartUrlRequestGoneError'
servers:
  - url: https://api.fanvue.com
components:
  schemas:
    GetUploadPartUrlRequestUnauthorizedError:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
      required:
        - error
      title: GetUploadPartUrlRequestUnauthorizedError
    GetUploadPartUrlRequestForbiddenError:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
      required:
        - error
      title: GetUploadPartUrlRequestForbiddenError
    GetUploadPartUrlRequestGoneError:
      type: object
      properties:
        error:
          type: string
        message:
          type: string
        nextVersion:
          type: string
      required:
        - error
        - message
      title: GetUploadPartUrlRequestGoneError
  securitySchemes:
    BearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer

```

## SDK Code Examples

```python
import requests

url = "https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/uploadId/parts/1.1/url"

headers = {
    "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
    "Authorization": "Bearer "
}

response = requests.get(url, headers=headers)

print(response.json())
```

```javascript
const url = 'https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/uploadId/parts/1.1/url';
const options = {
  method: 'GET',
  headers: {'X-Fanvue-API-Version': '2025-06-26', Authorization: 'Bearer '}
};

try {
  const response = await fetch(url, options);
  const data = await response.json();
  console.log(data);
} catch (error) {
  console.error(error);
}
```

```go
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"net/http"
	"io"
)

func main() {

	url := "https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/uploadId/parts/1.1/url"

	req, _ := http.NewRequest("GET", url, nil)

	req.Header.Add("X-Fanvue-API-Version", "2025-06-26")
	req.Header.Add("Authorization", "Bearer ")

	res, _ := http.DefaultClient.Do(req)

	defer res.Body.Close()
	body, _ := io.ReadAll(res.Body)

	fmt.Println(res)
	fmt.Println(string(body))

}
```

```ruby
require 'uri'
require 'net/http'

url = URI("https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/uploadId/parts/1.1/url")

http = Net::HTTP.new(url.host, url.port)
http.use_ssl = true

request = Net::HTTP::Get.new(url)
request["X-Fanvue-API-Version"] = '2025-06-26'
request["Authorization"] = 'Bearer '

response = http.request(request)
puts response.read_body
```

```swift
import Foundation

let headers = [
  "X-Fanvue-API-Version": "2025-06-26",
  "Authorization": "Bearer "
]

let request = NSMutableURLRequest(url: NSURL(string: "https://api.fanvue.com/media/uploads/uploadId/parts/1.1/url")! as URL,
                                        cachePolicy: .useProtocolCachePolicy,
                                    timeoutInterval: 10.0)
request.httpMethod = "GET"
request.allHTTPHeaderFields = headers

let session = URLSession.shared
let dataTask = session.dataTask(with: request as URLRequest, completionHandler: { (data, response, error) -> Void in
  if (error != nil) {
    print(error as Any)
  } else {
    let httpResponse = response as? HTTPURLResponse
    print(httpResponse)
  }
})

dataTask.resume()
```
